title: Manual Cleave Elution
author: Opentrons
materials: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Links
steps.instruction: Links: * [Manual Cleave](./121d15) * [Manual Cleave Elution (Off-deck Vacuum)](./121d15-4) * [Manual Cleave, ACN + Elution (Off-deck Vacuum)](./121d15-5) * [Manual Cleave, ACN + Elution (On-deck Vacuum)](./121d15-6) * [HPLC Picking](./121d15-3) * [Redo Replacement Picking (Greiner MASTERBLOCK 96 Well Plate 500 µL)](./121d15-2-96-Greiner-500) * [Redo Replacement Picking (Greiner MASTERBLOCK 96 Well Plate 1000 µL)](./121d15-2-96-Greiner-1000) * [Redo Replacement Picking (Irish Life Sciences 96 Well Plate 2200 µL)](./121d15-2-96-Irish-2200) * [Redo Replacement Picking (Greiner Masterblock 384 Well Plate 225 µL)](./121d15-2-384) * [Aliquoting - 2ml Tuberack to 2ml Tuberack](./121d15-7-2ml-2ml-aliquot) * [Aliquoting - 15ml Tuberack to 2ml Tuberack](./121d15-7-2ml-15ml-aliquot) * [Pooling - 2ml Tuberack to 2ml Tuberack](./121d15-7-2ml-2ml-pool) * [Pooling - 2ml Tuberack to 15ml Tuberack](./121d15-7-2ml-15ml-pool) This protocol performs a custom plate filling elution for up to 4x 96-well plates from a single reagent reservoir. The user can input the number of rows and columns to be filled for each plate. Liquid handling parameters are automatically determined from the user's selection of which reagent will be added during the run. ---

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
